# SVG2Img

> Free, privacy-first SVG to PNG/JPG/WebP converter that runs entirely in the browser.
> No files are uploaded to any server. Supports 1x-3x scaling and adjustable quality.

## Pages

- /zh/ : Chinese interface — upload or paste SVG, choose format and scale, download image
- /en/ : English interface — same functionality
- /zh/privacy/ : Privacy policy (Chinese)
- /en/privacy/ : Privacy policy (English)

## Features

- Convert SVG to PNG (lossless), JPG, or WebP
- 1x, 1.5x, 2x, 3x scaling for Retina displays
- Quality adjustment (1-100%) for JPG and WebP
- Drag-and-drop file upload or paste SVG code directly
- XSS sanitization: removes script tags and 39+ dangerous event handler attributes
- Client-side Canvas API rendering — zero server interaction
- Bilingual: Chinese and English

## Tech Stack

Astro 6 (SSG) + Vue 3 (island architecture) + Cloudflare Pages

## Source Code

https://github.com/qiaoqiaobby/svg2img (MIT License)

## Use Policy

Content may be freely cited for informational and search purposes.
